dialogue.location.umvuthana_grove/1: I heard there is a village of bird people at %2$s! Their leader wields the power of the sun, and its followers attack all travellers who come near them!
dialogue.location.frostmaw_spawn/1: A fearsome beast lives in the tundra near %2$s! Its ice breath has caused the end of many an adventurer.
dialogue.location.wrought_chamber/1: If you dig near %2$s, you'll find a chamber holding a living statue.
dialogue.location.monastery/1: There used to be a bunch of monks living in the mountains at %2$s, but they've since all disappeared. Could be worth checking out for treasure.
dialogue.location.iceologer_cabin/1: I heard stories of a house in the mountains at %2$s where a Pillager versed in ice magic lives.
dialogue.location.illusioner_shack/1: A powerful mage Pillager lives at %2$s! Beware, for he is a master of illusions!
dialogue.location.illusioner_training_ca: Deep in the woods near %2$s, Pillagers have set up a training camp. If you go anywhere near there, be careful. They shoot on sight.
dialogue.location.bastion_underground/1: Some old catacombs at %2$s have been taken over by the undead! They say a clan of skeletons are stockpiling supplies in it, but that sounds kind of ridiculous.
dialogue.location.city_overworld/1: Some villagers have built some strange, vertical living space at %2$s. I heard it's so tall, it scrapes the clouds in the sky!
dialogue.location.fortress_jungle/1: I noticed a huge fortress out in the jungle at %2$s.
dialogue.location.mansion_birch/1: If you go to %2$s, then you'll find a mansion owned by the illagers. If you value your life, don't come anywhere near that accursed place.
dialogue.location.mansion_desert/1: If you go to %2$s, then you'll find a mansion owned by the illagers. If you value your life, don't come anywhere near that accursed place.
dialogue.location.mansion_jungle/1: If you go to %2$s, then you'll find a mansion owned by the illagers. If you value your life, don't come anywhere near that accursed place.
dialogue.location.mansion_mangrove/1: If you go to %2$s, then you'll find a mansion owned by the illagers. If you value your life, don't come anywhere near that accursed place.
dialogue.location.mansion_oak/1: If you go to %2$s, then you'll find a mansion owned by the illagers. If you value your life, don't come anywhere near that accursed place.
dialogue.location.mansion_savanna/1: If you go to %2$s, then you'll find a mansion owned by the illagers. If you value your life, don't come anywhere near that accursed place.
dialogue.location.mansion_snowy/1: If you go to %2$s, then you'll find a mansion owned by the illagers. If you value your life, don't come anywhere near that accursed place.
dialogue.location.mansion_taiga/1: If you go to %2$s, then you'll find a mansion owned by the illagers. If you value your life, don't come anywhere near that accursed place.
dialogue.location.mineshaft_birch/1: There used to be a mine near %2$s, but it got closed after that huge accident.
dialogue.location.mineshaft_dark_forest/: There used to be a mine near %2$s, but it got closed after that huge accident.
dialogue.location.mineshaft_icy/1: There used to be a mine under the ice near %2$s, but it got closed after that huge accident.
dialogue.location.mineshaft_jungle/1: There used to be a mine near %2$s, but it got closed after that huge accident.
dialogue.location.mineshaft_ocean/1: There used to be a mine near %2$s, but it got closed after that huge accident.
dialogue.location.mineshaft_stone/1: Some geniuses tried to make a mineshaft under the ocean at %2$s. It's abandoned now, for obvious reasons.
dialogue.location.mineshaft_swamp/1: There used to be a mine near the swamp %2$s, but it got closed after it almost caved in that one time.
dialogue.location.mineshaft_taiga/1: There used to be a mine near %2$s, but it got closed after that huge accident.
dialogue.location.igloo_grassy/1: At %2$s there is an abandoned house made of dirt. I think it's been abandoned for a good while.
dialogue.location.igloo_mangrove/1: At %2$s there is an abandoned house made of mud and tree roots. I think it's been abandoned for a good while.
dialogue.location.igloo_mushroom/1: At %2$s there is an abandoned house made of mushrooms. I think it's been abandoned for a good while.
dialogue.location.igloo_stone/1: At %2$s there is an abandoned house made of rocks and moss. I think it's been abandoned for a good while.
dialogue.location.monument_desert/1: I saw a huge pyramid out in the desert near %2$s. If you ask me, it looks like those sunken castles in the deep oceans I hear in rumors!
dialogue.location.monument_icy/1: There is a giant ice castle at %2$s guarded by ghosts. Stay clear of it
dialogue.location.monument_jungle/1: There is an ancient temple at %2$s. If you value your life, you should avoid it or you might get killed by one of the undead that roam its halls.
dialogue.location.outpost_badlands/1: The Pillagers have set up an outpost at %2$s. The entire village would be thankful if you dealt with them, we can't stand another attack from their growing empire.
dialogue.location.outpost_birch/1: The Pillagers have set up an outpost at %2$s. The entire village would be thankful if you dealt with them, we can't stand another attack from their growing empire.

dialogue.location.pyramid_dark_forest/1: They say there's a pyramid at %2$s. The traps are still active, but maybe you could find some worthwhile treasure in there?

dialogue.location.village_badlands/1: At %2$s is another lovely village, in the middle of a badlands biome.
dialogue.location.village_bamboo/1: At %2$s is another lovely village, in the middle of a bamboo forest.
dialogue.location.village_birch/1: At %2$s is another lovely village, in the middle of a birch forest.
dialogue.location.village_cherry/1: At %2$s is another lovely village, in the middle of a cherry grove.
dialogue.location.village_dark_forest/1: At %2$s is another lovely village, in the middle of a dark forest biome.
dialogue.location.village_giant_taiga/1: At %2$s is another lovely village, in the middle of a taiga biome.
dialogue.location.village_jungle/1: At %2$s is another lovely village, in the middle of a jungle biome.
dialogue.location.village_mountains/1: At %2$s is another lovely village, in the middle of the mountains.
dialogue.location.village_mushroom/1: At %2$s is another lovely village, in the middle of a mushroom biome.
dialogue.location.village_oak/1: At %2$s is another lovely village, in the middle of a oak forest.
dialogue.location.village_swamp/1: At %2$s is another lovely village, in the middle of a swamp biome.
dialogue.location.witch_hut_birch/2: If I were you, I would avoid %2$s. There's this hut owned by that foul witch, and trust me, you don't want to be anywhere nearby.
dialogue.location.witch_hut_dark_forest/: If I were you, I would avoid %2$s. There's this hut owned by that foul witch, and trust me, you don't want to be anywhere nearby.
dialogue.location.witch_hut_giant_tree_t: If I were you, I would avoid %2$s. There's this hut owned by that foul witch, and trust me, you don't want to be anywhere nearby.
dialogue.location.witch_hut_mangrove/2: If I were you, I would avoid %2$s. There's this hut owned by that foul witch, and trust me, you don't want to be anywhere nearby.
dialogue.location.witch_hut_oak/2: If I were you, I would avoid %2$s. There's this hut owned by that foul witch, and trust me, you don't want to be anywhere nearby.
dialogue.location.witch_hut_taiga/2: If I were you, I would avoid %2$s. There's this hut owned by that foul witch, and trust me, you don't want to be anywhere nearby.
dialogue.location.roynhouse/1: There's this little block of bricks on the river at %2$s that keeps the freshest waters to themselves. If you can best this riparian menace, you would make a humble family of fishermen very happy.
dialogue.location.dungeon/1: There's this building in the wilderness at %2$s. I heard strange noises coming from the basement, but I'm too scared to go check it out myself.
dialogue.location.trials_chambers/1: There's a massive underground complex at %2$s, filled with monster spawners.
